title: Desktop Lifecycle Owner
problem: Proxy lifecycle policy is scattered across CLI, GUI, TUI, and admin callers, making default exit behavior easy to confuse and future tray/Tauri ownership hard to implement safely.
gates: cargo nextest run -p codex-helper cli_types supervisor_tests --no-fail-fast

evidence.summary: Opened workstream and froze lifecycle owner target state.
Completed lifecycle domain, owner markers, GUI/TUI/daemon adapter convergence, hidden desktop-managed sidecar semantics, docs, and targeted gates.

continue_policy.notes: Continue while default simple behavior remains non-resident and desktop/daemon owner modes stay explicit. Split full Tauri/service work as follow-on.
